steps.title: Find the actual subject
steps.content: "Among the clubs' leaders" is an introductory prepositional phrase, not the subject. The subject is Josephine St. Pierre Ruffin, a single person, so the verb must be singular.

steps.title: Match singular agreement
steps.content: B is plural past tense. C and D are also plural forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. The sentence needs the singular past-tense verb that agrees with Josephine St. Pierre Ruffin. The answer is A.
